entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop being developed for dwarfism

entities.name: D2 GENE
entities.description: A dwarfing gene used to create dwarf versions of pearl millet

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to transfer the d2 gene into tall composites

entities.name: GAM73
entities.description: An elite dwarf population of pearl millet used as a source for the d2 gene

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: The country where the GAM73 population was developed

entities.name: YIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Evaluation process conducted over 2 years to compare tall and dwarf composites

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where yield trials were conducted

entities.name: TIME TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A phenological character that showed interaction with the environment

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that interacted with the time to 50% flowering

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used as a performance metric

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant, positively correlated with yield in dwarf composites
